content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/models.py:1	import string2	import random3	from database import get_db_connection4	5	def generate_short_url(length=6):6	    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits7	    return ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))8	9	class URLModel:10	    @staticmethod11	    def create_url(original_url):12	        conn = get_db_connection()13	        short_url = generate_short_url()14	        15	        # Ensure uniqueness16	        while conn.execute('SELECT id FROM urls WHERE short_url = ?', (short_url,)).fetchone():17	            short_url = generate_short_url()18	            19	        conn.execute('INSERT INTO urls (original_url, short_url) VALUES (?, ?)',20	                     (original_url, short_url))21	        conn.commit()22	        conn.close()23	        return short_url24	25	    @staticmethod26	    def get_original_url(short_url):27	        conn = get_db_connection()28	        url = conn.execute('SELECT original_url FROM urls WHERE short_url = ?',29	                           (short_url,)).fetchone()30	        conn.close()31	        if url:32	            return url['original_url']33	        return None34	35	    @staticmethod36	    def get_all_urls():37	        conn = get_db_connection()38	        urls = conn.execute('SELECT * FROM urls').fetchall()39	        conn.close()40	        return urls
